title: Uruguayan Empanada Filling
description: A vegetarian twist on a traditional Uruguayan empanada filling, featuring caramelized onions and a sweet mirin glaze.

ingredients.name: Onions
ingredients.notes: Caramelize in a pan over medium heat for 20-25 minutes

ingredients.name: Empanada dough
ingredients.notes: Available at most grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Shredded cheese
ingredients.notes: Monterey Jack or Cheddar work well

instructions: Roll out empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place a tablespoon of caramelized onions in the center of each dough circle.
Add a sprinkle of shredded cheese on top of the onions.
Brush the edges of the dough with a little water.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-circle, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with a little mirin glaze (1 tablespoon mirin + 1 tablespoon water).
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Optional: add a sprinkle of bitter to the mirin glaze for added depth of flavor.
